delta: . What would you like to work on

text: I'm a coding assistant built by Anthropic. I help with software engineering tasks — reading and writing code, debugging, running commands, making commits, and navigating codebases. I'm currently set up in your `acpfx` project. What would you like to work on?
I'm a coding assistant built by Anthropic.
Ha — looks like you quoted me back. What can I help you with?
I was made by Anthropic, based in San Francisco. But I run right here on your machine as Claude Code. Anything you'd like to work on?
